---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report of an encountered issue
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Encountered behavior**
A clear and concise description of the library's encountered behavior

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Usage environment**
Specify Gleam and library version, what environment the behaviour occurred in, and provide a copy of the code if possible.

**Any other notes**
